text: 请用一句话解释什么是稀疏专家模型，以及为什么它能减少每个 token 的计算量。
Explain why a sparse mixture-of-experts model can have many total parameters while activating only a small subset for each token.
Write a Python function that implements an LRU cache and briefly explain its eviction policy.
A model selects 8 experts per token across 40 layers. If one expert is 6 MiB, calculate the theoretical cold read volume for one token.
We are continuing the design of a tiered-memory MoE runtime. Compare the tradeoffs between a larger expert cache and more SSD reads.
